title: Poetry: Mariposa del Aire
description: A lovely poem by Federico García Lorca.

sentences.spanish: Mariposa del aire, qué hermosa eres.
sentences.english: Butterfly of the air, how beautiful you are.

sentences.spanish: Mariposa del aire, dorada y verde.
sentences.english: Butterfly of the air, golden and green.

sentences.spanish: Luz del candil, mariposa del aire.
sentences.english: Light of the lamp, butterfly of the air.

sentences.spanish: No te quieres parar, pararte no quieres.
sentences.english: You do not want to stop, to stop you do not want.

sentences.spanish: Mariposa del aire, dorada y verde.
sentences.english: Butterfly of the air, golden and green.

sentences.spanish: Luz del candil, mariposa del aire.
sentences.english: Light of the lamp, butterfly of the air.
Stay there! Butterfly, are you there?
